nodes.title: Distributed Systems Fundamentals
nodes.learningObjective: Master the core principles of scalability, fault tolerance, and consensus in distributed architectural design.

nodes.title: Robot Kinematics and Dynamics
nodes.learningObjective: Analyze the mathematical foundations of motion, including spatial transformations and manipulator Jacobian matrices.

nodes.title: Molecular Biology for Engineers
nodes.learningObjective: Understand cellular structures, genetic coding, and protein synthesis as biological information systems.

nodes.title: Sensor Fusion Theory
nodes.learningObjective: Apply probabilistic methods to integrate data from heterogeneous sensors for state estimation.

nodes.title: Embedded Systems and RTOS
nodes.learningObjective: Design low-latency software architectures for deterministic control of physical hardware.

nodes.title: Bio-Robotic Interfacing
nodes.learningObjective: Design physical and digital interfaces that bridge biological tissues with electromechanical actuators.

nodes.title: Autonomous Navigation Systems
nodes.learningObjective: Implement SLAM and path-planning algorithms for mobile robotic platforms in unstructured environments.

nodes.title: Microfluidic System Architectures
nodes.learningObjective: Engineer Lab-on-a-Chip systems for automated biological sample processing and analysis.

nodes.title: Edge Computing for Robotics
nodes.learningObjective: Optimize computational workloads between local robotic controllers and distributed cloud infrastructure.

nodes.title: Biometric Data Pipelines
nodes.learningObjective: Construct scalable architectures for the ingestion, storage, and processing of high-throughput biological sensor data.

nodes.title: Synthetic Biology Automation
nodes.learningObjective: Automate the design-build-test-learn cycle of genetic engineering using robotic liquid handlers and bioreactors.

nodes.title: Swarm Robotics for Bio-Logistics
nodes.learningObjective: Coordinate multi-agent robotic systems for high-efficient pharmaceutical manufacturing and laboratory logistics.

nodes.title: Neural Prosthetic Design
nodes.learningObjective: Develop closed-loop neural interfaces that interpret biological signals for high-degree-of-freedom limb control.

nodes.title: AI-Driven Bioprocess Control
nodes.learningObjective: Deploy machine learning models for real-time optimization of complex biological production environments.

nodes.title: Tele-Surgical Robotics Architecture
nodes.learningObjective: Engineer ultra-reliable, low-latency architectures for remote surgical intervention and haptic feedback.
